x-enumeration-literals.name: Single Recipient Allocation Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Single Recipient Allocation Modality specifies that the entire incentive amount is allocated to a single recipient or account.

Comment:
Example:
An employee receives a €1,000 bonus directly in their payroll account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Split Allocation Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Multiple Recipient / Split Allocation Modality specifies that the incentive is split among multiple recipients according to predefined ratios or rules.

Comment:
Example:
A €5,000 sales bonus split among 5 team members equally (€1,000 each) or based on performance metrics.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Pro-Rata Allocation Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Pro-Rata Allocation Modality specifies that the incentive is allocated proportionally based on contribution, performance, or predefined criteria.

Comment:
Example:
A €2,000 incentive distributed among employees according to percentage of target achieved: 60%, 25%, 15%.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Conditional Allocation Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Conditional / Rule-Based Allocation Modality specifies that incentives are allocated only if certain conditions, thresholds, or rules are met.

Comment:
Example:
Incentive only allocated to employees who achieved >100% of sales target; others receive nothing.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tiered Allocation Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tiered Allocation Modality specifies that incentives are allocated in tiers based on performance or ranking.

Comment:
Example:
Top 10% of salespeople get 50% of the incentive pool, next 20% get 30%, remaining get 20%.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Component-Based Allocation Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Component-Based Allocation Modality specifies that incentives are allocated across different components such as base bonus, performance bonus, or non-cash rewards.

Comment:
Example:
€1,000 incentive: €600 cash bonus, €200 gift voucher, €200 loyalty points.
